All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

S

save() - Method in class mru.store.controller.StoreManager
This method saves user changes back into the toys.txt database.
saveMessage() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints after a toy is sucessfully added to the database
searchBySerialNumber(String) - Method in class mru.store.controller.StoreManager
This method searches the database using a serial number and prompts the user if they want to purchase a toy.
searchByToyName(String) - Method in class mru.store.controller.StoreManager
This method searches the database according to user inputed string, returns the search results, and prompts the user what toy they want to purchase.
searchByToyType(int) - Method in class mru.store.controller.StoreManager
This method searches the database based on the type of toy the user inputed, returns search results, and prompts the user if they want to purchase a toy.
searchInventory() - Method in class mru.store.controller.StoreManager
This method displays the menu to search for toys and takes user input to determine what way we are going to look for toys.
searchResults() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message with search results
selectOption() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user to select an option
serialCheck - Variable in class mru.store.controller.StoreManager
 
serialLong - Variable in class mru.store.controller.StoreManager
 
serialNumber - Variable in class mru.store.controller.StoreManager
 
serialNumber - Variable in class mru.store.model.Toy
 
setAnimalMaterial(String) - Method in class mru.store.model.Animals
This method sets the animal material.
setAnimalMaterialTest() - Method in class mru.store.model.AnimalsTest
 
setAnimalSize(String) - Method in class mru.store.model.Animals
This method sets the animal size.
setAnimalSizeTest() - Method in class mru.store.model.AnimalsTest
 
setAppropriateAge(int) - Method in class mru.store.model.Toy
This method sets the appropriate age for a toy.
setAvailableCount(int) - Method in class mru.store.model.Toy
This method sets the available amount of a toy.
setBoardGameDesginersTest() - Method in class mru.store.model.BoardGamesTest
 
setBoardGameDesigners(String) - Method in class mru.store.model.BoardGames
This methods sets the designers for a board game.
setFigureClassification(String) - Method in class mru.store.model.Figures
This method sets the figure classification.
setFigureClassificationTest() - Method in class mru.store.model.FiguresTest
 
setMaxPlayerCount(int) - Method in class mru.store.model.BoardGames
This method sets the maximum amount of players for a board game and throws a custom exception if the max player count is less than the minimum.
setMaxPlayerCountTest() - Method in class mru.store.model.BoardGamesTest
 
setMinimumPlayerCount(int) - Method in class mru.store.model.BoardGames
This method sets the minimum amount of players needed for a board game.
setMinimumPlayerCountTest() - Method in class mru.store.model.BoardGamesTest
 
setPlayerCountRange(String) - Method in class mru.store.model.BoardGames
This method sets the allowed amount of players as a range.
setPuzzleType(String) - Method in class mru.store.model.Puzzles
The method sets the puzzle type.
setPuzzleTypeTest() - Method in class mru.store.model.PuzzlesTest
 
setSerialNumber(String) - Method in class mru.store.model.Toy
This method sets the serial number.
setToyBrand(String) - Method in class mru.store.model.Toy
This method sets the toy brand.
setToyName(String) - Method in class mru.store.model.Toy
This method sets the toy name.
setToyPrice(double) - Method in class mru.store.model.Toy
This method sets the toys price and checks to make sure it's not negative.
showMainMenu() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints the main menu.
showSearchInventory() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints the search inventory menu.
StoreManager - Class in mru.store.controller
This class represents the coordination of the view and model classes to create a functional store.
StoreManager() - Constructor for class mru.store.controller.StoreManager
This method is the constructor to initialize toyList, appMenu, and scanner.
